title: Nimbus Post is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nimbus Post is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
